## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Safety

- [ ] No API keys, proxy tokens, `.env`, `.scythe-context/`, `.repo-beacon/`, `local/`, or private reference files are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed.
